pi_items.source: task.json specification; path is as specified in task description and setup script
Task description requires exactly 6 columns: Time, Source, Destination, Host, Method, URI
Task description explicitly specifies these 6 column names in this exact order
Official Wireshark sample http.cap file, packet 4, HTTP request header contains Host: www.ethereal.com
Official Wireshark sample http.cap file, packet 4, HTTP request method is GET /download.html HTTP/1.1
Official Wireshark sample http.cap file, packet 4, HTTP request URI is /download.html

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real network data from the official Wireshark sample capture file http.cap (26KB), downloaded from wiki.wireshark.org. The file contains HTTP traffic from May 13, 2004. Packet 4 contains the first HTTP GET request to www.ethereal.com with URI /download.html, which are the specific values the verifier checks for. The task requires exporting exactly 6 columns (Time, Source, Destination, Host, Method, URI) in CSV format with UTC Date and Time of Day format for timestamps.
